bearer_token.description: Timely OAuth access token, sent as a Bearer token (Authorization: Bearer <token>). Never logged.

account_id.description: Timely account id every stream's path is prefixed with (<account_id>/<resource>).

base_url.description: Timely API base URL override for tests or proxies.

start_date.description: Optional lower bound sent as the 'since' query param on the 'events' stream only; omitted entirely (and every other stream unaffected) when unset.
